title: Bombay Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bombay Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bombay Hospital:
Bombay Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital!
